subcodes.first_line: The mention of thy name hath been made before the Wronged One, and He remembereth thee with this clear remembrance, that thy heart may rejoice thereby and thy breast be dilated therewith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم و انه یذکرک بهذا الذکر المبین لیفرح به قلبک و ینشرح به صدرک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
